meaning: vt.使超载,超过负荷n.超载,负荷过多
examples: Don't overload the boat or it will sink.
There is always an internal circuit breaker to protect the instrument from overload.
DDoS is where large numbers of computers, under malicious control, overload their target with web requests.
Ness was fascinated by the idea of "information overload" and how relevant it is to today.
